title: Prehistoric fossils
description: This modpack integrates the Prehistoric Nature mod, plus its dimensions, and the Fossils and Archeology Revival mod
body:
This modpack integrates the Prehistoric Nature mod, plus its dimensions, and the TreeChopper mod and a few extremely basic support mods added.  Plants which still exist now are set to spawn in the Overworld. We've bundled in an optional texturepack which you might like to play with. If you need Optifine, you need to add that manually.




to run this pack on For optimal performance use 4gb ram or more 

 

optifine                                                                        
 there should be no issue using optifine in this modpack
